calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Russell A. Robinson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Domingo Pascua, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants.
Plaintiff's request for Default Judgment for:
Damages $221,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $56,156.10
Costs $432.50, for a total of $277,588.60 is taken under submission.
Plaintiff's request to amend the Defendatns names to Carina L. Pascua aka Carina Lacuesta, and Diana A. Menor aka Diana Antonio Menor is granted in open court.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
